column8: I hope to start driving as soon as I'm seventeen.
column9: Stop pretending being asleep. I saw you open your eyes!
column10: My mum suggested to go bowling, but I didn't think that was a good idea.

column13: Do you like watching TV or do you prefer play computer games?

column17: Don't let the dog sitting on the sofa!
